title: Poss'Nomin

The '''Poss'Nomin''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] indigenous to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Illarreen]]. Thickly built [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] slightly larger than the average [[Human/Legends|Human]], they were easily recognized by their large, shovel-shaped jaws and their three [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].

==Biology and appearance==
Poss'Nomin had thick [[Bone/Legends|bones]], which made them bulky in comparison to other [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoids]] of the same average height, though no more muscular. Their large jaws were filled with both flat and sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]], an adaptation to an [[Diet/Legends|omnivorous diet]]. Their skin was almost entirely [[Color/Legends|red]], though some racial groups had brown or black forearm spots. Their wide faces were set off by angular cheek bones trimmed with knobs of cartilage, and with their three large [[Eye/Legends|eyes]].<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

The three eyes of the Poss'Nomin were widely set in a horizontal row, giving them a wide field of vision. Each eye had two fleshy eyelids, with the outer one used primarily during sleep. Their eyes were mostly orange, except for irises which ranged from yellow to dark blue.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

==Culture and History==
[[File:PossNomin-Journal14.jpg|thumb|left|A Poss'Nomin]]
The Poss'Nomin first arose on the east coast of the island continent [[Vhin]], in the northern hemisphere of Illarreen. Though it was initially a comfortable home, intense climate change over the course of a few centuries (possibly due to solar flares from their [[Star/Legends|sun]]) rendered it uninhabitable. This spurred the development of boat-building technologies, allowing the Poss'Nomin to explore and settle more hospitable regions of Vhin and the rest of Illarreen. Ever since those [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of migration, a fundamental desire to explore was part of the Poss'Nomin psyche.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

Millennia after their great explorations, Poss'Nomin civilization had grown and fragmented into several powerful nations, each with its own political ideologies and goals. These differences led to a period of global warfare, which only stopped when a group of [[Spice/Legends|spice]] traders came across their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] circa [[100 BBY/Legends|100 BBY]]. Within ten years of first contact, the Poss'Nomin nations put aside their differences, formed a united government, and joined forces in order to enter the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] community.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

The united government formed by the Poss'Nomin was a loose federation, with most of the power still in the hands of regional governments. Officials in all of these regional governments were chosen through popular elections held every three standard years, with all adult Poss'Nomin allowed to vote. Most Poss'Nomin voted for leaders who would best help their people in the galactic community.<ref name="Alien Encounters" />

By the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], one third of the population boasted galactic-standard technology. Many Poss'Nomin left their homeworld, frequently working as [[Scout/Legends|scouts]] or in other [[Spacer/Legends|space-faring professions]],<ref name="Alien Encounters" /> such as the explorer [[Kiv'arwa]], who worked for [[Rim Commercial Mining]].<ref name="Alien Encounters (article)">{{JournalCite|14|Alien Encounters (article series)}}</ref> Some of these Poss'Nomin traveled deep within [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] or even [[Unknown Regions/Legends|beyond]].<ref name="Alien Encounters" /> A less reputable heir to this Poss'Nomin exploratory tradition was the legendary [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Reginald Barkbone]].<ref name="Underworld Appendix">{{Hyperspace|url=hyperspace/member/insideronline/89/indexp3.html|text=Underworld Appendix: Swoops, Spice, and Wretched Rogues|int=Underworld Appendix: Swoops, Spice, and Wretched Rogues}}</ref>
